zh.lifeSummary: 當Joanna Montgomerie於大約1380年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾阿爾德洛桑時，她的父親Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan19歲，母親Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald18歲。她於1401年與Thomas Boyd 4th Feudal Baron of Kilmarnock在蘇格蘭艾斯爾阿爾德洛桑結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1469年在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可享年90歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joanna Montgomerie于大约1380年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾阿爾德洛桑时，她的父亲Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan19岁，母亲Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald18岁。她于1401年与Thomas Boyd 4th Feudal Baron of Kilmarnock在苏格兰艾斯爾阿爾德洛桑结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1469年在英国苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可享年90岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可。

nameMeanings.name: Montgomerie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, Scottish: Scottish spelling of   Montgomery  .

variants.name: Montgomery
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Sainte-Foy-de-Montgomery and Saint-Germain-de-Montgomery (Calvados). In Ireland this surname was present in the medieval period, died out, and was then reintroduced from Scotland in the 17th century. It has been Gaelicized in Ireland as Mac Iomaire and in Scotland as Mac Gumaraid.

nameMeanings.name: Joanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joanna Montgomerie was born about 1380, in Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan, was 19 and her mother, Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald, was 18. She married Thomas Boyd 4th Feudal Baron of Kilmarnock in 1401, in Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1469, in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 90, and was buried in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joanna Montgomerie est née environ 1380, à Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Boyd 4th Feudal Baron of Kilmarnock en 1401, à Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1469, à Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 90 ans, et a été enterrée à Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joanna Montgomerie um 1380 in Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan 19 und ihre Mutter Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald 18. Sie hat 1401 in Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Scotland Thomas Boyd 4th Feudal Baron of Kilmarnock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1469 im Alter von 90 Jahren in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joanna Montgomerie è nata il circa 1380 nel Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Boyd 4th Feudal Baron of Kilmarnock nel 1401, nel Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1469, nel Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 90 anni, e fu sepolta a Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Joanna Montgomerieが約1380年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアアルドロッサンで生まれた時，父Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossanは19歳，母Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonaldは18歳であった。1401年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアアルドロッサンでThomas Boyd 4th Feudal Baron of Kilmarnockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1469年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマルノックで90歳で死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマルノックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joanna Montgomerie(이)가 대략 1380년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 아드로산에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1401년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 아드로산에서 Thomas Boyd 4th Feudal Baron of Kilmarnock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1469년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 킬마노크에서 90세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬마노크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joanna Montgomerie nasceu aproximadamente 1380, em Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Boyd 4th Feudal Baron of Kilmarnock em 1401, em Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1469, em Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 90 anos, e foi sepultada em Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joanna Montgomerie родилась около 1380 г. в местности ардроссан, аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Boyd 4th Feudal Baron of Kilmarnock в 1401 г. в местности ардроссан, аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1469 г. в местности килмарнокк, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 90 лет и была похоронена в местности килмарнокк, аиршир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joanna Montgomerie nació aproximadamente 1380, en Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Thomas Boyd 4th Feudal Baron of Kilmarnock en 1401, en Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1469, en Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 90 años, y fue sepultada en Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland.
